title: Identity Bootstrap & UX — Plan 4a: IdentityService RPC Surface + CLI
summary: Implementation plan exposing UsersBackend as an IdentityService ConnectRPC API with Cedar admin gating and an auth CLI subtree.
notes: Task-by-task implementation plan with file structure and symbol-lifetime sweep; resembles a technical spec but is a build plan referencing an upstream design doc rather than declaring a locked decision or product requirement.
